main.loading_desc: The model will be downloaded on first run. Subsequent launches will load it from local cache (~250MB).
main.ready_title: VoiceFlow AI is ready in the background
main.ready_desc: Press and hold the <1>{{key}}</1> key anywhere to speak

settings.title: Settings
settings.language_desc: Choose the display language for the application
settings.mode_tip: If text fails to output in games or elevated apps, switch to Clipboard Only mode.
settings.hotwords_tip: Comma separated. ASR and LLM will heavily favor these terms.
settings.listen_key_tip: Global shortcut to start recording. Release to transcribe.
settings.blacklist_tip: Shortcut will be disabled when focused on these apps (e.g. games) to prevent lag.
settings.autostart_tip: Run silently in the background when logging in.
settings.backup_tip: If auto-update fails, you can manually download the latest installer below:
settings.hotwords_placeholder: e.g. Tauri, Enigo, Vue, Noise Cancelling
settings.asr_lang_tip: Specify the target language for Whisper. Manual selection is recommended for higher accuracy.
settings.asr_api_tip: Use a fast cloud API (like Groq) for real-time streaming transcription.
settings.already_latest: You are already on the latest version!
settings.update_fail_desc: Auto-update failed. This might be due to network issues connecting to GitHub.
settings.check_update_fail: Failed to check for updates. Network error.
settings.local_engine_desc2: Ultra-fast multilingual model, running natively on the underlying engine. Instant response.
settings.blacklist_ph: e.g. csgo.exe, LOL.exe (separated by comma or newline)
settings.llm_toggle_tip: When disabled, the app acts purely as a voice dictation tool and outputs raw text directly without LLM refinement.
settings.ollama_disconnected: Ollama not detected, please ensure it is running
settings.screen_capture_tip: When enabled, screenshots are sent to the LLM during dictation to provide visual context (requires multimodal models like GPT-4o). Automatically falls back to text-only mode on failure.

moonshot.name: Kimi (Moonshot)
moonshot.desc: Kimi model, excels at long texts

yi.name: 01.AI (Yi)
yi.desc: Yi series models by Kai-Fu Lee's team

siliconflow.name: SiliconFlow (CN)
siliconflow.desc: Domestic aggregator, supports multiple open-source models

zhipu.name: Zhipu AI (GLM)
zhipu.desc: Zhipu GLM series, flash version is free

ollama.name: Ollama (Local)
ollama.desc: Runs locally, no API Key required

settings.smart_context_tip: Automatically switch prompt styles based on the active application window

history.title: Dictation & Refinement History
history.confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to clear all history? This action cannot be undone.
history.empty: No history yet. Press the shortcut key anywhere to start dictating.
